mapper.select: SELECT P.PET_ID AS petId, P.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS species, P.BREED AS breed, P.GENDER AS gender, P.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, P.AGE AS age, P.WEIGHT AS weight, P.IS_REPRESENT AS isRepresent, P.PHOTO_URL AS photoUrl, P.DEL_YN AS delYn, P.REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_PET P WHERE P.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NVL(P.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY P.IS_REPRESENT DESC NULLS LAST, P.PET_ID ASC

SELECT P.PET_ID AS petId, P.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, P.PET_NAME AS petName, P.SPECIES AS species, P.BREED AS breed, P.GENDER AS gender, P.BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, P.AGE AS age, P.WEIGHT AS weight, P.IS_REPRESENT AS isRepresent, P.PHOTO_URL AS photoUrl, P.DEL_YN AS delYn, P.REG_DATE AS regDate FROM TB_PET P WHERE P.PET_ID = #{petId} AND P.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NVL(P.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PET WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NVL(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_RESERVATION WHERE PET_ID = #{petId} AND STATUS_CD IN ('PENDING', 'CONFIRMED')
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PET.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_PET ( PET_ID, MEMBER_NO, PET_NAME, SPECIES, BREED, GENDER, BIRTH_DATE, AGE, WEIGHT, IS_REPRESENT, PHOTO_URL, DEL_YN, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{petId}, #{memberNo}, #{petName}, #{species}, #{breed, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{age, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{weight, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{isRepresent, jdbcType=CHAR}, #{photoUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N', SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PET SET PET_NAME = #{petName}, SPECIES = #{species}, BREED = #{breed, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GENDER = #{gender, jdbcType=CHAR}, BIRTH_DATE = #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, AGE = #{age, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, WEIGHT = #{weight, jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE PET_ID = #{petId} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND NVL(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'
